About

Working style and technical philosophy

A longer narrative page for how I think about reliable ML systems, documentation, and cross-functional delivery.

Positioning

Data specialist with hands-on experience in modeling, evaluation, feature pipelines, experimentation, and MLOps operations. I care about readable systems, stable metrics, and documentation surfaces that make technical decisions easy to review.

Working Philosophy

  • Treat data quality as a product surface, not a cleanup phase.
  • Keep research grounded in deployment constraints and measurement.
  • Use documentation to reduce ambiguity across data, modeling, and platform teams.

What matters in ML systems

Good ML systems are not only accurate. They remain measurable when upstream data changes, understandable when teams need to review them, and maintainable when the original builder is no longer in the room.

Donghyeon Kim

Data Specialist with applied research, data engineering, and MLOps range.
